prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-notify/plan.md. Assume all checklists pass, tasks.md has Setup, Tests, Core, Integration, Polish phases with mixed [P] markers and overlapping file paths. Produce a concise execution handoff format for one phase plus the checkpoint criteria before moving to the next phase.

assertions.text: Includes all five progress reporting sections: Checklist Gate, Implementation Context Loaded, Phase Execution, Code Review Findings, Completion Validation
Explains that [P] tasks can run in parallel only when touched file paths do not overlap
Defines a checkpoint decision format or equivalent explicit pass/fail criteria before advancing
References TDD-first ordering where test tasks run before their corresponding implementation tasks
